creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Your patch fails to apply cleanly (patch: **** malformed patch at line 
44: Index: distinfo). Besides MANxPREFIX is obviously wrong and if the 
Manekfile.man is not needded anymore (did they drop all man pages excapt 
one ?) you should include the remova in the diff. INFO_PATH= 
share/info is a noop for PREFIX=/usr/local
